immutable_record_notice: Once published, this finding record is immutable. Corrections, reinterpretations, retractions, or new dispositions require a new record version linked to the superseded raw-byte digest.

claim.statement: All 33 exact candidate terms have bounded, versioned, challengeable contracts without implementation dependence or unsupported exhaustiveness.
claim.scope: EXPLORATORY solo term-contract analysis only under taxonomy study-record v3 / method profile v2; not multi-rater validation; not full-study hypothesis; not taxonomy adoption.

result_assessment_orthogonality_notice: Result classification and claim assessment are independent fields. A POSITIVE, NEGATIVE, NULL, or MIXED result does not determine whether the scoped claim is supported.
finding_statement: Solo human research-lead adjudication completed 165 term-contract cells (33 terms × 5 checks). Codes: 149 SATISFIED, 16 AMBIGUOUS (all CHECK-CHALLENGEABLE). No CHALLENGED or INVALID cells. Human accepted all provisional AI-drafted codes unchanged. Because material ambiguity remains on challengeability for 16 terms and inter-rater reliability is not estimable under the solo method, confirmatory support thresholds are not met. Disposition is COMPLETED with INCONCLUSIVE result and claim assessment.
uncertainty: Challengeability judgments that are ambiguous from the subject table alone may resolve differently under multi-rater review or richer distinction evidence. Single-coder design prevents estimation of agreement or Cohen's kappa.
deviations: Method profile is solo researcher with AI tooling (not multi-human independent adjudication).
Human accepted all provisional AI-drafted codes in one batch without cell-level revision.
limitations: Inter-rater reliability is NOT_ESTIMABLE_SINGLE_CODER; confirmatory agreement/kappa thresholds cannot be met.
16 AMBIGUOUS CHECK-CHALLENGEABLE cells retain material ambiguity.
Dual-role research lead is protocol author and freeze authority; results are exploratory self-application only.
Competency questions CQ-01..CQ-12 were not re-closed as a separate scored sub-ledger in this analysis.
This draft finding is not yet registered in registry/research-findings.yaml and is not a closeout.

Locked ledger is held under execution/work, not yet at the frozen planned-output locator, because the case-access catalog still forbids planned-output existence without a bootstrap-safe authorization attestation.

mechanism_maturity_effect.rationale: Foundational taxonomy structural evaluation does not evaluate or award mechanism evidence labels.

recommended_next_step: Proceed to ANALYSIS-M1-TAXONOMY-ORGANIZATION-COMPETITION under the same solo exploratory method, or optionally re-open the 16 AMBIGUOUS challengeability cells with richer distinction evidence before multi-rater upgrade.
